reviewer.displayName: SIC TRANSIT GLORIA MUNDI GLORIA MUNDI

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación del ACA, sencilla pero un buen lugar para hacer un alto, cargar combustible, tomar un café  y continuar. Los baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
A very good ACA station, simple but a good place to stop, refuel, have a coffee, and continue on your way. The restrooms are clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzdEk3am1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar, buenos servicios y muy buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Very good place, good services and very good attention.

(Translated by Google)
Very good attention and excellent service...spotless bathrooms
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzMUthVVdBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es estación de servicio y Parador. Vi parrillas y mesas con bancos (de cemento) para q descanse el viajero. Pero no se si esas parrillas se puedan usar. Los baños estaban muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
It's a gas station and rest stop. I saw grills and tables with (cement) benches for travelers to rest. But I don't know if those grills are usable. The restrooms were very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzNUwtSlpnEAE

reviews.comment:
En 2 oportunidades en vacaciones no había combustible, sobre todo en un lugar tan turístico y sobre ruta nacional. Muy mal

(Translated by Google)
On two occasions during our vacation, there was no fuel, especially in such a touristy area and on the national highway. Very bad.
